2603.25686.title: Just Zoom In: Cross-View Geo-Localization via Autoregressive Zooming
2603.25686.paper_summary: Cross-view geo-localization (CVGL) estimates a camera's location by matching a street-view image to geo-referenced overhead imagery, enabling GPS-denied localization and navigation. Existing methods almost universally formulate CVGL as an image-retrieval problem in a contrastively trained embedding space. This ties performance to large batches and hard negative mining, and it ignores both the geometric structure of maps and the coverage mismatch between street-view and overhead imagery. In particular, salient landmarks visible from the street view can fall outside a fixed satellite crop, making retrieval targets ambiguous and limiting explicit spatial inference over the map. We propose Just Zoom In, an alternative formulation that performs CVGL via autoregressive zooming over a city-scale overhead map. Starting from a coarse satellite view, the model takes a short sequence of zoom-in decisions to select a terminal satellite cell at a target resolution, without contrastive losses or hard negative mining. We further introduce a realistic benchmark with crowd-sourced street views and high-resolution satellite imagery that reflects real capture conditions. On this benchmark, Just Zoom In achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving Recall@1 within 50 m by 5.5% and Recall@1 within 100 m by 9.6% over the strongest contrastive-retrieval baseline. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of sequential coarse-to-fine spatial reasoning for cross-view geo-localization.
2603.25686.paper_summary_zh: 跨視角地理定位 (CVGL) 通過將街景圖像與地理參考的高空影像匹配來估算相機的位置，使得在無法使用 GPS 的情況下仍能進行定位和導航。現有的方法幾乎普遍將 CVGL 公式化為在對比訓練的嵌入空間中的圖像檢索問題。這使得性能與大批量和困難的負樣本挖掘相關聯，並且忽略了地圖的幾何結構以及街景與高空影像之間的覆蓋不匹配。特別是，從街景中可見的顯著地標可能超出固定的衛星裁剪範圍，這使得檢索目標變得模糊，並限制了對地圖的明確空間推理。我們提出了 Just Zoom In，一種通過在城市規模的高空地圖上自回歸縮放來執行 CVGL 的替代公式。從粗略的衛星視圖開始，模型採取一系列短暫的縮放決策，以選擇目標解析度的終端衛星單元，無需對比損失或困難的負樣本挖掘。我們進一步引入了一個現實的基準，該基準包含眾包的街景和高解析度的衛星影像，反映了真實的捕獲條件。在這個基準上，Just Zoom In 實現了最先進的性能，將 50 米內的 Recall@1 提高了 5.5%，將 100 米內的 Recall@1 提高了 9.6%，超過了最強的對比檢索基線。這些結果展示了從粗到細的序列空間推理在跨視角地理定位中的有效性。
2603.25686.author: Yunus Talha Erzurumlu et.al.
2603.25686.authors: Yunus Talha Erzurumlu, Jiyong Kwag, Alper Yilmaz
